issues.description: Condition checks HasCardOnBoard with name 'CP', but text requires checking Leader's type includes 'CP'. Should be LeaderHasType condition, not HasCardOnBoard.
SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter specifics: must filter for Character cards with type including 'CP' and cost ≤5. Current filter is 'Any' with no type/cost constraints.
Action plays 1 card to board but doesn't trash remaining 4 cards. Need second action: ForceDiscard to trash rest of looked-at cards.
Second effect (Trigger with PlayFromHand) is spurious and contradicts main effect. No second trigger exists in card text. Should be removed.
Card text specifies cost ≤5, but DSL shows maxCost:3. Should be maxCost:5.
